mapper.sql: id, name, category, description, base_premium, max_coverage, min_age, max_age, status, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO insurance_plans (name, category, description, base_premium, max_coverage, min_age, max_age, status, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{description}, #{basePremium}, #{maxCoverage}, #{minAge}, #{maxAge}, #{status}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE insurance_plans SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, base_premium = #{basePremium}, max_coverage = #{maxCoverage}, min_age = #{minAge}, max_age = #{maxAge}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.tag FROM insurance_plan_tags pt JOIN insurance_tags t ON pt.insurance_tags_id = t.id WHERE pt.insurance_plan_id = #{planId}
